writing.title: Writing Task 1: Interview questions
writing.prompt: Write 4 short questions (using Do/Does) you would ask someone about their daily life, and answer one of them.
writing.sampleAnswer: What time do you start work? Where do you work? Why do you like your job? I start work at eight o'clock. I work in a small office downtown.
checklist: Dùng đúng Do/Does theo chủ ngữ
Có ít nhất 3 câu hỏi khác nhau
Trả lời được ít nhất 1 câu bằng câu đầy đủ

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Express disagreement
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) disagreeing with an idea, using don't/doesn't and never/rarely.
writing.sampleAnswer: I disagree. I think the answer is wrong. He never eats fast food, and he rarely watches TV. He doesn't like noisy places at all.
checklist: Dùng never hoặc rarely ít nhất 1 lần
Thể hiện rõ quan điểm không đồng ý
